chapters.title: Into the Goblin Forest
lines: Your master's last words still echo in your ears.
The Tower of Numbers has fallen.
Goblins march from the forest.
They carry stolen wisdom with them.
You are the last apprentice.
The math is yours to wield.
Cast true and save the tower.
And so you step into the trees...

chapters.title: Into the Crystal Cave
lines: The Goblin Warlord falls.
His stolen tomes scatter across the mud.
One page remains clutched in his hand.
It shows a map — a cave of crystal and shadow.
The goblins stole something deeper here.
Something ancient and sharp as a prism.
You descend into the dark.
The crystals catch your light and multiply it.

chapters.title: The Dragon Peak
lines: Zharx the Crystal Titan crumbles to shards.
The cave exhales a hot breath.
Far above, smoke curls from a broken mountain.
A dragon's peak — ember-lit and terrible.
The stolen knowledge burns somewhere in that fire.
Every wizard before you turned back here.
You tighten your grip on your spell tome.
The mountain waits.

chapters.title: The Astral Void
lines: Wyrm Emberhart collapses in a storm of smoke.
The sky above splits open like a wound.
Stars pour through the crack.
A void stretches beyond the peak — cold and vast.
The stolen wisdom has been scattered across the cosmos.
Only the numbers you know can guide you through.
You step into the dark between stars.
The void hums a question you must answer.

chapters.title: The Lich Citadel
lines: The Void Oracle fades like smoke.
One final vision burns in your mind.
A citadel of black stone on a dying plain.
The Lich King sits at its heart.
He hoards the last of the stolen knowledge.
He has kept it locked in bone and shadow for centuries.
This is the final climb.
Every answer you have ever given has led here.

chapters.title: The Tower Restored
lines: Morthas the Lich King crumbles to dust.
The stolen knowledge rises from the rubble like dawn.
Every equation he hoarded flows back into the world.
The Tower of Numbers blazes with light.
Somewhere, students open their books and remember.
Your master smiles in the light.
The math was yours to wield.
And you wielded it true.

victories: Carry the one — carry the day!
taunts: Your books won't help you here!
